_note: forge codex — game forms for hoop in-world minigames. knowns are hand-written; minted are foundry-discovered (laws no one wrote). Baked offline by scripts/mint-forge-codex.mjs; the in-world layer runs atlas.puzzleFor() on these. Re-mint to refresh.

laws.name: walk (knack/morph)
laws.text: You step one cell at a time.

laws.name: ice (knack frost)
laws.text: You slide until something stops you.

laws.name: leap (checkers-like)
laws.text: You leap two cells, vaulting whatever lies between (or step, if the far cell is taken).

laws.name: paint (lights-like)
laws.text: You step one cell at a time; each cell you enter flips — clean to inked, inked to clean.

laws.name: the Withering Discipline
laws.text: You step forward — but if the way is blocked, you rebound a cell backward instead; a move is only legal when the cell ahead is clean; you ink every cell you leave; each cell you enter flips — clean to inked, inked to clean; inked cells are solid — you cannot enter them; after every move your heading turns right.

laws.name: the Turning Rite
laws.text: You leap two cells, vaulting whatever lies between (or step, if the far cell is taken); after every move your heading turns left.

laws.name: the Withering Custom
laws.text: You leap two cells, vaulting whatever lies between (or step, if the far cell is taken); every cell you leave hardens into wall behind you — there is no going back; each cell you enter flips — clean to inked, inked to clean; after every move your heading turns left.

laws.name: the Withering Custom III
laws.text: You slide until something stops you; you ink every cell you leave; each cell you enter is wiped clean; inked cells are solid — you cannot enter them.

laws.name: the Severing Creed
laws.text: You leap two cells, vaulting whatever lies between (or step, if the far cell is taken); every cell you leave hardens into wall behind you — there is no going back; each cell you enter flips — clean to inked, inked to clean; inked cells are quick — they carry you an extra cell.

laws.name: the One-Way Walk
laws.text: You step forward — but if the way is blocked, you rebound a cell backward instead; a move is only legal when the cell ahead is clean; every cell you leave hardens into wall behind you — there is no going back; inked cells are quick — they carry you an extra cell.

laws.name: the Staining Rite
laws.text: You step forward — but if the way is blocked, you rebound a cell backward instead; each cell you enter becomes inked.

laws.name: the Inking Gait
laws.text: You step one cell at a time; you ink every cell you leave; each cell you enter becomes inked; inked cells are quick — they carry you an extra cell; after every move your heading turns right.
